welfare.title: Karnataka Government Welfare Schemes
welfare.subtitle: Explore and apply for Karnataka Government welfare schemes designed to empower citizens and improve quality of life.
welfare.portalsDescription: Apply directly to official Karnataka Government portals for these welfare schemes.
welfare.ctaDescription: Visit the Seva Sindhu Portal to explore all schemes and submit your application. Support is available for the entire process.
